---
title: "HIV Transmission Model"
description: "Simplified HIV transmission with four infectious stages (Acute, Chronic 1-2, AIDS) and antiretroviral therapy intervention based on Granich et al."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2019-03-01"
categories: [HIV, stage-dependent, ART, intervention, advanced]
order: 8
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
